add-text-to-pdf-page.title: Add Text to a PDF Page Using TextFragment
add-text-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a TextFragment, set its position and appearance, append it to a page, and save the updated document.

insert-identical-text-on-all-pdf-pages.title: Insert Identical Text on All PDF Pages
insert-identical-text-on-all-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to add the same plain text to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by iterating through the Pages collection and appending a TextFragment.

apply-custom-true-type-font-to-pdf.title: Apply Custom TrueType Font to PDF Text
apply-custom-true-type-font-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a TrueType font from a memory stream, embed it, and assign it to a TextState for rendering custom‑styled text in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-custom-otf-font-to-pdf.title: Apply Custom OpenType Font to PDF Text
apply-custom-otf-font-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an OTF font, embed it in a PDF, and apply it to a TextFragment for styled text output.

set-character-spacing-in-pdf.title: Set Character Spacing for PDF Text
set-character-spacing-in-pdf.description: Creates a PDF, adds a TextFragment and configures its TextState to increase character spacing, then saves the document with platform‑specific handling.

add-left-aligned-text-to-pdf.title: Add Left-Aligned Text to PDF
add-left-aligned-text-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextFragment, setting its horizontal alignment to left, positioning it on the page, and saving the modified document.

center-text-horizontally-in-pdf.title: Center Text Horizontally in PDF
center-text-horizontally-in-pdf.description: Shows how to add a TextFragment to a PDF page and center it horizontally by setting the HorizontalAlignment property.

render-superscript-text.title: Render Superscript Text in PDF
render-superscript-text.description: Demonstrates how to display superscript characters in a PDF by setting the TextState.Superscript property on a TextFragment.

render-subscript-text-unicode.title: Render Subscript Text Using Unicode Characters
render-subscript-text-unicode.description: Demonstrates how to display subscript characters in a PDF by using a Unicode subscript glyph within a TextFragment and setting font properties.

set-custom-line-spacing-for-added-text.title: Set Custom Line Spacing for Added Text in PDF
set-custom-line-spacing-for-added-text.description: Demonstrates adding a text paragraph to a PDF page with custom leading (line spacing) using Aspose.Pdf's TextState and TextBuilder.

adjust-word-spacing-in-pdf.title: Adjust Word Spacing of Inserted Text in PDF
adjust-word-spacing-in-pdf.description: Shows how to set the TextState.WordSpacing property of a TextFragment to increase spacing between words when adding text to an existing PDF document.

justify-text-in-pdf.title: Justify Text in PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
justify-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a TextFragment, and setting its HorizontalAlignment to Justify so the text spans the full page width.

enable-rtl-text-direction-in-pdf.title: Enable Right-to-Left Text Direction and Add Arabic Text to PDF
enable-rtl-text-direction-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to set a PDF's reading order to right‑to‑left and insert Arabic text using Aspose.Pdf, including font selection and embedding.

render-bidirectional-text-pdf.title: Render Bidirectional Text in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
render-bidirectional-text-pdf.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF containing mixed left‑to‑right and right‑to‑left text by using Unicode directional marks and enabling the TextState bidirectional flag.

set-custom-line-height-pdf-text.title: Set Custom Line Height for PDF Text
set-custom-line-height-pdf-text.description: Shows how to apply a custom line spacing to PDF text by configuring the TextState.LineSpacing property and adding a TextParagraph to a page.

add-text-fragment-with-character-spacing.title: Add Text Fragment with Character Spacing
add-text-fragment-with-character-spacing.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextFragment to a PDF, set its font, size, position, and adjust character spacing as an alternative to kerning using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-fragment-to-pdf.title: Add Text Fragment to PDF with Ligature Support
add-text-fragment-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextFragment, configuring its TextState (font and size), positioning it on a page, and saving the document. It notes that ligatures are applied automatically when the chosen font supports them.

enable-automatic-hyphenation-pdf.title: Enable Automatic Hyphenation for Long Words in PDF
enable-automatic-hyphenation-pdf.description: Shows how to turn on automatic hyphenation for long words by configuring TextParagraph's FormattingOptions and adding the paragraph to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

embed-css-in-htmlfragment.title: Embed CSS in HtmlFragment for PDF Generation
embed-css-in-htmlfragment.description: Shows how to embed CSS rules inside an HtmlFragment to control font, color, and line spacing when rendering HTML content into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

attach-javascript-action-to-text-annotat.title: Attach JavaScript Action to a PDF Text Annotation
attach-javascript-action-to-text-annotat.description: Loads a PDF, creates a visible link annotation, attaches a JavaScript action that displays an alert, and saves the modified document.

add-internal-text-link-go-to-action.title: Add Internal Text Link to PDF Using GoToAction
add-internal-text-link-go-to-action.description: Loads an existing PDF, inserts a visible text fragment as a hyperlink, and creates a LinkAnnotation with a GoToAction that navigates to a specified page within the same document.

add-clickable-hyperlink-text-to-pdf.title: Add Clickable Hyperlink Text to PDF
add-clickable-hyperlink-text-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a TextFragment with a WebHyperlink into an existing PDF, creating a clickable text segment that opens a URL.

add-launch-action-to-pdf.title: Add Launch Action to PDF Text
add-launch-action-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place clickable text in a PDF that opens an external file using a launch action with Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-specific-text-fragment.title: Rotate Specific Text Fragment in PDF
rotate-specific-text-fragment.description: Loads a PDF document, searches for a given text fragment, rotates the first occurrence by 45 degrees, and saves the modified file.

insert-rotated-text-on-second-page.title: Insert Rotated Text on Second PDF Page
insert-rotated-text-on-second-page.description: Demonstrates how to use TextBuilder to add a rotated TextFragment to the second page of an existing PDF document.

create-rotated-text-paragraph.title: Create Rotated Text Paragraph with Multiple Fragments
create-rotated-text-paragraph.description: Shows how to build a TextParagraph from several TextFragments, set its bounding rectangle, apply a 30‑degree rotation, and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-text-in-pdf.title: Replace Text in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
replace-text-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate all occurrences of a phrase using TextFragmentAbsorber, replace the text, and save the updated document.

extract-email-addresses-from-pdf-pages.title: Extract Email Addresses from PDF Pages Using Regex
extract-email-addresses-from-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to search each page of a PDF for email addresses using a regular expression with Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and collect the results per page.

identify-line-breaks-in-textfragment.title: Identify Line Breaks in TextFragment
identify-line-breaks-in-textfragment.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through each page and its TextFragment paragraphs, splits the fragment text into logical lines, and determines whether each line ends with a line‑break for custom layout processing.

extract-line-break-info-from-pdf-text-fr.title: Extract Line Break Information from PDF Text Fragments
extract-line-break-info-from-pdf-text-fr.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, absorb text fragments, and determine line‑break positions by comparing Y‑coordinates of consecutive text segments, logging the results to the console.

append-disclaimer-to-first-pdf-page.title: Append Disclaimer Text to First PDF Page
append-disclaimer-to-first-pdf-page.description: Shows how to add a disclaimer as a TextFragment to the end of the first page's paragraph collection in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-header-text-in-pdfs.title: Rotate Header Text in PDFs by 90 Degrees
rotate-header-text-in-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to batch‑process PDF files, detect header text fragments using a font‑size heuristic, and rotate those fragments 90° with Aspose.Pdf.

replace-text-rotate-page-save-to-memory-.title: Replace Text and Rotate Page, Save PDF to MemoryStream
replace-text-rotate-page-save-to-memory-.description: Demonstrates how to replace specific text, rotate a page, and save the modified PDF into a memory stream using Aspose.Pdf.

validate-pdf-log-search.title: Validate PDF, Enable Logging, and Search Text
validate-pdf-log-search.description: Shows how to enable PDF validation logging, perform a text search using TextFragmentAbsorber, and verify that the log file contains the validation details.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.title: Extract Text from PDF and Save as UTF-8 File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting all page text using TextAbsorber, and writing the concatenated result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

extract-line-break-positions-from-pdf.title: Extract Line‑Break Positions from PDF TextFragments
extract-line-break-positions-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF, absorb its text fragments, compute the Y‑coordinates of each visual line within a fragment, and write those line‑break positions to a JSON file.

add-rotated-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-rotated-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder and TextFragment to place a semi‑transparent, rotated watermark on every page of a PDF document.

replace-text-on-specific-pdf-pages.title: Replace Text on Specific PDF Pages
replace-text-on-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to replace a given phrase only within a defined page range of a PDF by iterating pages and using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber.

highlight-keyword-occurrences-pdf.title: Highlight Keyword Occurrences in PDF (Case‑Insensitive)
highlight-keyword-occurrences-pdf.description: Shows how to search a PDF for a case‑insensitive keyword using a regular expression and highlight each found instance with a yellow background.

add-rotated-mixed-style-paragraph-to-pdf.title: Add Rotated Mixed‑Style Text Paragraph to PDF Page
add-rotated-mixed-style-paragraph-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextParagraph with mixed font styles, rotating it, and inserting it onto the third page using Aspose.Pdf.

batch-replace-text-in-pdf.title: Batch Replace Text in PDF Using a Dictionary
batch-replace-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over a dictionary of old‑new string pairs, find each occurrence using TextFragmentAbsorber, replace the text, and save the updated document.

extract-text-word-count-per-pdf-page.title: Extract Text and Count Words per PDF Page
extract-text-word-count-per-pdf-page.description: Loads a PDF, extracts each page's text with TextAbsorber, counts the words, and writes page numbers with word counts to a CSV file.

rotate-draft-text-fragments.title: Rotate 'Draft' Text Fragments in PDF
rotate-draft-text-fragments.description: Shows how to search for the word "Draft" in a PDF and apply a 15‑degree rotation to each matching text fragment using Aspose.Pdf.

find-dates-in-pdf-using-regex.title: Find Dates in PDF Using Regex
find-dates-in-pdf-using-regex.description: Demonstrates how to locate all dates in the MM/DD/YYYY format within a PDF by applying a regular‑expression pattern with TextFragmentAbsorber on each page.

append-multiple-textfragments-get-line-p.title: Append Multiple TextFragments and Get Line‑Break Positions
append-multiple-textfragments-get-line-p.description: Demonstrates how to add several TextFragment objects to a PDF page in one operation and retrieve each fragment's baseline Y‑coordinate for custom line‑break handling.

rotate-text-in-table-cell.title: Rotate Text in a PDF Table Cell
rotate-text-in-table-cell.description: Demonstrates how to rotate all text fragments inside a specific table cell of a PDF by 60 degrees using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragment.Rotation property.

rotate-pdf-title-text.title: Rotate PDF Title Text by 45 Degrees
rotate-pdf-title-text.description: Shows how to load PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, extract all text fragments, rotate each fragment 45 degrees, and save the updated documents to a specified output directory.

add-rotated-text-bottom-right-last-page.title: Add Rotated Text to Bottom‑Right of Last PDF Page
add-rotated-text-bottom-right-last-page.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder to place a rotated text paragraph at the bottom‑right corner of the last page of a PDF document.

add-clickable-hyperlink-to-text.title: Add Clickable Hyperlink to Text in PDF
add-clickable-hyperlink-to-text.description: Shows how to search for a specific phrase in a PDF and replace it with a clickable hyperlink using a link annotation.

extract-pdf-text-sentences-per-page.title: Split PDF Text into Sentences and Write Each to a New Page
extract-pdf-text-sentences-per-page.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts all its text, splits the text into individual sentences, and creates a new PDF where each sentence is placed on its own page as a TextFragment.

rotate-form-field-text.title: Rotate Form Field Text by Adjusting Appearance
rotate-form-field-text.description: Creates a PDF with a text box form field and rotates its displayed text by modifying the field's appearance rectangle.

batch-keyword-replacement-pdf.title: Batch Keyword Replacement in PDF
batch-keyword-replacement-pdf.description: Shows how to load a JSON mapping of old and new strings and replace all occurrences of each keyword across all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

find-approximate-text-fuzzy-regex.title: Find Approximate Text in PDF Using Fuzzy Regex
find-approximate-text-fuzzy-regex.description: Demonstrates how to locate approximate matches of a target phrase in a PDF by building a fuzzy regular‑expression pattern and using Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber with TextSearchOptions. Matching fragments are highlighted and the document is saved.

right-align-text-pdf.title: Right Align Text in PDF using Aspose.Pdf
right-align-text-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to right‑align a text fragment on a PDF page by setting the TextState.HorizontalAlignment property to Right.

add-multi-line-text-paragraph.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Paragraph to PDF
add-multi-line-text-paragraph.description: Demonstrates creating a multi‑line TextParagraph, configuring its rectangle, wrapping, alignment, and margins, then adding lines in edit mode and placing the paragraph on a PDF page using TextBuilder.

add-hyperlink-to-text-segment.title: Add Hyperlink to Text Segment in PDF
add-hyperlink-to-text-segment.description: Shows how to create a clickable hyperlink inside a PDF by assigning a WebHyperlink to a TextSegment, adding it to a TextFragment, and placing the fragment on a page.

add-html-fragment-to-pdf.title: Add HTML Fragment with Styled Text to PDF
add-html-fragment-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert an HTML fragment containing styled markup into a PDF page using HtmlFragment and optional TextState customization.

create-footnote-with-image.title: Create Footnote with Image in PDF
create-footnote-with-image.description: Shows how to add a footnote to a paragraph and insert an image into the footnote's Paragraphs collection using Aspose.Pdf.

add-table-inside-footnote-to-pdf.title: Add Table Inside Footnote to PDF
add-table-inside-footnote-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a footnote (Note) for a TextFragment and populate its Paragraphs collection with a Table, including borders and padding, then save the PDF.

add-formatted-endnote-to-pdf.title: Add Formatted Endnote with Bold and Italic Text
add-formatted-endnote-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert an endnote into a PDF and apply bold and italic formatting using a TextState object.

combine-inline-text-image-paragraph.title: Combine Inline Text and Image in a PDF Paragraph
combine-inline-text-image-paragraph.description: Demonstrates how to add TextFragment and Image objects as inline elements within a single paragraph to create a mixed text‑image line in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-invisible-tooltip-button-over-text.title: Add Invisible Tooltip Button Over Text in PDF
add-invisible-tooltip-button-over-text.description: Shows how to locate a specific text string in a PDF, obtain its rectangle, and place an invisible ButtonField over it to act as a tooltip using Aspose.Pdf.

find-specific-phrase-in-pdf.title: Find Specific Phrase in PDF Using TextAbsorber
find-specific-phrase-in-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber (derived from TextAbsorber) to locate every occurrence of a given phrase in a PDF and retrieve page, position, and font details.

replace-text-phrases-pdf-preserve-format.title: Replace Text Phrases in PDF While Preserving Formatting
replace-text-phrases-pdf-preserve-format.description: Demonstrates how to find specific phrases in a PDF, replace them with new text, and retain the original font, size, color, and other formatting using Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Header to All PDF Pages
add-header-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through each page, and insert a centered header text at the top of every page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-footer-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Footer Page Numbers to PDF
add-footer-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a centered footer with page numbers on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.description: Shows how to overlay a semi‑transparent text watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by creating a WatermarkAnnotation with a configured TextState.

rotate-text-in-pdf.title: Rotate Text in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
rotate-text-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a text fragment by setting the TextState.Rotation property and render it on a PDF page using TextBuilder.

apply-background-color-to-text.title: Apply Background Color to Text in PDF
apply-background-color-to-text.description: Demonstrates how to set a background color for a text fragment by configuring its TextState before adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

style-textfragment-font-size-color.title: Style TextFragment with Font Size and Color
style-textfragment-font-size-color.description: Demonstrates how to set the font size, text color, and optional font family for a TextFragment using TextState, add it to a PDF page, and save the document with platform‑specific handling.

add-text-to-pdf-memory-stream.title: Add Text to PDF Using Memory Streams
add-text-to-pdf-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a stream, inserting a text fragment on the first page, and returning the modified document as a MemoryStream.

modify-pdf-and-get-bytes.title: Modify PDF and Return as Byte Array
modify-pdf-and-get-bytes.description: Loads a PDF, adds a text annotation on the first page, and returns the modified document as a byte array using a memory stream.

add-text-and-encrypt-pdf.title: Add Text and Encrypt PDF with Password
add-text-and-encrypt-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a red 'Confidential' text fragment to the first page, then encrypts the document with user and owner passwords and limited permissions before saving.

add-underlined-text-to-pdf.title: Add Underlined Text to PDF
add-underlined-text-to-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextFragment, sets its Underline property, positions it on the page, and saves the modified document.

create-strikethrough-text.title: Create Strikethrough Text in PDF
create-strikethrough-text.description: Shows how to enable the StrikeOut property on a TextFragment and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.
